fa-arrow-up-left.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward upper-left corner; angled shaft with arrowhead aimed at top-left
fa-arrow-up-left.functionalityId: navigates or moves content toward the upper-left; returns focus to the previous upper-left position
fa-arrow-up-left.intentId: go back or return to a prior upper-left location; reposition content diagonally toward the top-left

fa-arrow-up-left-from-circle.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal arrow exiting toward the upper-left; enclosed ring with outward-pointing upper-left arrow
fa-arrow-up-left-from-circle.functionalityId: extracts or exports content out of a container toward the upper-left; dismisses or collapses an element away from center
fa-arrow-up-left-from-circle.intentId: exit or leave an enclosing area toward the upper-left; detach an item from its current context

fa-arrow-up-long.appearanceId: tall straight arrow with a single arrowhead pointing straight up; elongated vertical upward-pointing shaft
fa-arrow-up-long.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content upward; increases or promotes a value in an upward direction
fa-arrow-up-long.intentId: move to the top of a list or page; increase a numeric or ranked value

fa-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward upper-right corner; angled shaft with arrowhead aimed at top-right
fa-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: navigates or opens content in the upper-right direction; links to an external page or expanded view
fa-arrow-up-right.intentId: open a link or resource in a new context; move content diagonally toward the upper-right

fa-arrow-up-right-and-arrow-down-left-fr.appearanceId: two arrows diverging from center — one pointing upper-right and one pointing lower-left; outward-expanding diagonal arrow pair
fa-arrow-up-right-and-arrow-down-left-fr.functionalityId: expands a panel or modal to full screen; enlarges a view by pushing content outward from center
fa-arrow-up-right-and-arrow-down-left-fr.intentId: enter full-screen or maximize a view; spread content to occupy more space

fa-arrow-up-right-dots.appearanceId: upward-right arrow accompanied by small dots along its path; ascending diagonal arrow with scattered dot markers
fa-arrow-up-right-dots.functionalityId: indicates growth trend or rising data points; navigates to an increasing or expanding dataset
fa-arrow-up-right-dots.intentId: view an upward trend or growth chart; track increasing progress over time

fa-arrow-up-to-arc.appearanceId: vertical arrow pointing up toward a curved arc at the top; upward shaft meeting a convex curved boundary
fa-arrow-up-to-arc.functionalityId: uploads or sends content up to a bounded limit; scrolls content up to a defined ceiling or arc boundary
fa-arrow-up-to-arc.intentId: submit or push data up to a cap or threshold; reach the upper boundary of a contained area

fa-arrow-up-to-bracket.appearanceId: upward arrow pointing into an open bracket or tray shape at the top; vertical shaft aimed at a horizontal shelf
fa-arrow-up-to-bracket.functionalityId: uploads a file or item to a storage location; submits content into a designated slot or container
fa-arrow-up-to-bracket.intentId: upload a file to the cloud or server; save content into a holding area

fa-arrow-up-to-dotted-line.appearanceId: upward arrow whose tip meets a horizontal dotted line; vertical arrow pointing to a dashed boundary above
fa-arrow-up-to-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves content up to a defined boundary or limit; aligns or snaps an element to a dotted guideline above
fa-arrow-up-to-dotted-line.intentId: snap content to an upper boundary or threshold; align an item precisely to a dotted guide

fa-arrow-up-z-a.appearanceId: upward arrow beside descending letters Z and A; vertical arrow with Z-to-A letter labels
fa-arrow-up-z-a.functionalityId: sorts a list in reverse alphabetical order from Z to A; applies descending alphabetical sorting
fa-arrow-up-z-a.intentId: sort items from Z to A in descending order; reverse the alphabetical sort of a list

fa-arrows.appearanceId: four arrows pointing outward in the four cardinal directions forming a cross; cross-shaped four-way directional arrows
fa-arrows.functionalityId: enables dragging or repositioning an element in any direction; activates a move or pan interaction
fa-arrows.intentId: move or drag an element to a new position; reposition an object freely on the canvas

fa-arrows-alt.appearanceId: four diagonal arrows pointing toward each corner of a square; outward-pointing arrows at all four corners
fa-arrows-alt.functionalityId: expands content to full screen or maximum size; enlarges a view or modal in all diagonal directions
fa-arrows-alt.intentId: maximize or go full screen; expand a view to fill available space

fa-arrows-cross.appearanceId: four arrows meeting at a central cross point, each pointing outward along cardinal axes; plus-shaped arrow cluster
fa-arrows-cross.functionalityId: enables free movement or panning of an element; triggers a drag-and-drop or repositioning mode
fa-arrows-cross.intentId: reposition an element freely in any cardinal direction; enter a move or pan mode

fa-arrows-down-to-line.appearanceId: two downward arrows converging toward a horizontal line at the bottom; paired arrows pointing down to a baseline
fa-arrows-down-to-line.functionalityId: collapses or docks content downward to a baseline; aligns multiple items to a bottom edge
fa-arrows-down-to-line.intentId: anchor or align content to the bottom boundary; collapse items down to a lower limit

fa-arrows-down-to-people.appearanceId: downward arrows pointing toward person silhouettes below; arrows descending onto human figure icons
fa-arrows-down-to-people.functionalityId: assigns or distributes resources down to team members; delegates tasks or content to listed people
fa-arrows-down-to-people.intentId: distribute or assign items to individual people; push resources or tasks down to team members

fa-arrows-from-dotted-line.appearanceId: arrows pointing outward away from a central dotted line; diverging arrows expanding from a dashed midpoint
fa-arrows-from-dotted-line.functionalityId: expands content outward from a reference line; spreads or separates elements away from a guide
fa-arrows-from-dotted-line.intentId: spread items apart from a central reference; expand content outward from a dividing line

fa-arrows-from-line.appearanceId: arrows pointing outward in both directions from a solid horizontal line; bidirectional arrows diverging from a baseline
fa-arrows-from-line.functionalityId: expands or separates content away from a fixed line; increases spacing outward from a reference point
fa-arrows-from-line.intentId: increase spacing or margins away from a boundary; expand elements outward from a dividing line

fa-arrows-h.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows pointing in opposite directions forming a left-right span; bidirectional horizontal arrow
fa-arrows-h.functionalityId: resizes or stretches an element horizontally; adjusts the width of a panel or column
fa-arrows-h.intentId: resize content horizontally; adjust the width of an element or column

fa-arrows-left-right-to-line.appearanceId: left and right arrows pointing toward a central vertical line; inward-pointing horizontal arrows meeting a midline
fa-arrows-left-right-to-line.functionalityId: collapses or centers content to a vertical midline; snaps left and right edges to a central guide
fa-arrows-left-right-to-line.intentId: center or collapse content to a vertical axis; align left and right boundaries to a midpoint

fa-arrows-minimize.appearanceId: four arrows pointing inward toward the center from each corner; converging diagonal arrows aimed at the center
fa-arrows-minimize.functionalityId: collapses or minimizes a panel or modal to a smaller size; contracts a view inward to reduce its footprint
fa-arrows-minimize.intentId: minimize or shrink a view to a smaller state; collapse an expanded panel back to compact size

fa-arrows-rotate-reverse.appearanceId: circular arrow arc rotating in a counterclockwise direction; curved arrow loop with tail pointing counterclockwise
fa-arrows-rotate-reverse.functionalityId: undoes the last rotation or reverses a spinning action; re-syncs or refreshes content in the reverse direction
fa-arrows-rotate-reverse.intentId: undo a rotation or reverse a recent action; refresh data by cycling in the opposite direction

fa-arrows-spin.appearanceId: four arrows arranged in a circular spinning pattern; rotating loop of four outward-curving arrows
fa-arrows-spin.functionalityId: triggers a reload or continuous refresh cycle; indicates an ongoing spinning or loading process
fa-arrows-spin.intentId: refresh or reload content continuously; indicate a recurring or looping process

fa-arrows-split-up-and-left.appearanceId: a single arrow forking into two branches — one pointing up and one pointing left; Y-shaped arrow split going upward and leftward
fa-arrows-split-up-and-left.functionalityId: splits or routes content into two separate upward and leftward paths; forks a flow or navigation into two directions
fa-arrows-split-up-and-left.intentId: branch a workflow into two separate directions; split content or routing into upward and leftward paths

fa-arrows-to-circle.appearanceId: multiple arrows pointing inward toward a central circle; converging arrows aimed at an enclosed ring
fa-arrows-to-circle.functionalityId: consolidates or gathers content toward a central point; focuses multiple inputs into a single target
fa-arrows-to-circle.intentId: consolidate or merge items toward a central hub; focus multiple sources into one destination

fa-arrows-to-dot.appearanceId: four arrows pointing inward toward a central dot; converging cardinal arrows aimed at a small center point
fa-arrows-to-dot.functionalityId: centers or collapses content toward a single focal point; aligns multiple elements to converge on one spot
fa-arrows-to-dot.intentId: center all elements on a single focal point; converge multiple items toward one location

fa-arrows-to-dotted-line.appearanceId: arrows pointing inward toward a central dotted horizontal line; converging arrows meeting a dashed midline
fa-arrows-to-dotted-line.functionalityId: snaps or aligns elements to a dotted center guide; collapses content inward toward a reference boundary
fa-arrows-to-dotted-line.intentId: align content to a dotted guideline; snap items to a dashed reference line

fa-arrows-to-eye.appearanceId: arrows pointing inward toward an eye symbol at center; converging arrows aimed at an eyeball focal point
fa-arrows-to-eye.functionalityId: focuses the view or zooms into a point of interest; centers the display around a highlighted element
fa-arrows-to-eye.intentId: focus the camera or viewport on a specific target; zoom in to inspect a point of interest

fa-arrows-to-line.appearanceId: arrows pointing inward toward a central solid horizontal line; converging arrows meeting a midline baseline
fa-arrows-to-line.functionalityId: aligns or snaps content to a center line; collapses elements inward to a shared horizontal axis
fa-arrows-to-line.intentId: align multiple items to a shared horizontal baseline; snap content to a center guideline

fa-arrows-turn-right.appearanceId: arrow path that turns and redirects to the right; bent arrow making a right-angle turn to the right
fa-arrows-turn-right.functionalityId: redirects a flow or route to the right; indicates a turn or navigation step toward the right
fa-arrows-turn-right.intentId: follow a turn or redirect to the right; change the direction of a flow or route rightward

fa-arrows-turn-to-dots.appearanceId: arrows curving and terminating at dot endpoints; bent arrows whose tips end in small filled circles
fa-arrows-turn-to-dots.functionalityId: maps or routes content between defined waypoint markers; connects directional paths to specific target dots
fa-arrows-turn-to-dots.intentId: navigate between waypoints or route stops; connect a path to specific marked destinations

fa-arrows-up-to-line.appearanceId: two upward arrows pointing toward a horizontal line at the top; paired arrows rising to a ceiling baseline
fa-arrows-up-to-line.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content upward to a defined ceiling; aligns multiple elements to a top edge boundary
fa-arrows-up-to-line.intentId: anchor or align content to the top boundary; raise items up to an upper limit

fa-arrows-v.appearanceId: two vertical arrows pointing in opposite directions — one up and one down; bidirectional vertical arrow
fa-arrows-v.functionalityId: resizes or stretches an element vertically; adjusts the height of a panel or row
fa-arrows-v.intentId: resize content vertically; adjust the height of an element or row

fa-asl-interpreting.appearanceId: two hands in signing gesture positions representing sign language; a pair of hand shapes arranged in an ASL pose
fa-asl-interpreting.functionalityId: enables ASL or sign language interpretation support; activates accessibility features for hearing-impaired users
fa-asl-interpreting.intentId: access sign language interpretation services; enable deaf or hard-of-hearing accessibility support

fa-asterisk.appearanceId: six-pointed star-like symbol with thin radiating lines from center; a small starburst with symmetric spokes
fa-asterisk.functionalityId: marks a field as required or adds a footnote annotation; flags important or mandatory content with a symbol
fa-asterisk.intentId: indicate a required field or footnote reference; highlight special or mandatory information

fa-at.appearanceId: letter A enclosed inside a circular looping tail; at-sign symbol with a curled encircling stroke
fa-at.functionalityId: composes or addresses an email message; mentions or tags a user in a message or post
fa-at.intentId: send an email or mention someone directly; tag a person or address in a message

fa-atlas.appearanceId: open book with a world map or globe depicted on the pages; bound volume displaying geographic imagery
fa-atlas.functionalityId: opens a geographic reference or map collection; browses world or regional map content
fa-atlas.intentId: explore geographic maps or world reference material; navigate to a location-based knowledge resource

fa-atom.appearanceId: three elliptical orbits crossing around a central nucleus dot; intersecting oval rings encircling a small center point
fa-atom.functionalityId: opens a science, chemistry, or physics section; represents atomic or molecular data content
fa-atom.intentId: explore scientific or atomic data; navigate to chemistry or physics-related content

fa-atom-alt.appearanceId: three elliptical orbits with electron dots shown along the paths around a nucleus; orbital rings with visible electron markers
fa-atom-alt.functionalityId: opens a detailed atomic structure or science reference; displays atomic model with electron positions
fa-atom-alt.intentId: view a detailed atomic or molecular model; access advanced science or chemistry content

fa-audio-description.appearanceId: letters AD enclosed in or beside a speaker or waveform shape; text label AD with an audio broadcast symbol
fa-audio-description.functionalityId: enables audio description track for visual media; toggles narrated descriptions for visually impaired users
fa-audio-description.intentId: turn on audio descriptions for accessibility; support visually impaired users with narrated media

fa-audio-description-slash.appearanceId: letters AD with a diagonal slash line crossing through them; audio description symbol with a strikethrough
fa-audio-description-slash.functionalityId: disables or mutes the audio description track; turns off narrated accessibility descriptions for media
fa-audio-description-slash.intentId: turn off audio descriptions for media playback; disable the accessibility narration track

fa-austral-sign.appearanceId: uppercase letter A with two horizontal crossbars through the middle; currency symbol resembling a barred letter A
fa-austral-sign.functionalityId: displays or selects the Argentine austral currency; labels a price or amount in austral denomination
fa-austral-sign.intentId: indicate a value in Argentine austral currency; select or display austral-denominated pricing

fa-avocado.appearanceId: pear-shaped fruit with a large pit visible inside and green outer layer; halved avocado showing brown seed and flesh
fa-avocado.functionalityId: browses healthy food or nutrition options; filters menu items by avocado or plant-based ingredient
fa-avocado.intentId: find avocado-based dishes or healthy food options; log or select an avocado ingredient in a meal

fa-award.appearanceId: circular medallion badge with a ribbon or star at top and a hanging ribbon streamer below; round medal with decorative ribbon
fa-award.functionalityId: grants or displays an achievement badge or recognition; highlights a top-rated or awarded item
fa-award.intentId: recognize or celebrate an achievement or accomplishment; view awarded or top-ranked items

fa-award-simple.appearanceId: simple circular medallion with a small ribbon at top and no detailed decoration; plain round badge with minimal ribbon detail
fa-award-simple.functionalityId: marks or displays a basic award or recognition badge; assigns a simple achievement indicator
fa-award-simple.intentId: acknowledge a basic accomplishment or milestone; mark an item as recognized or rewarded

fa-axe.appearanceId: single-bladed axe with a long handle and curved cutting head; a wood-chopping hatchet with elongated grip
fa-axe.functionalityId: selects or equips an axe tool in a game or simulation; accesses a logging or crafting action
fa-axe.intentId: perform a cutting or chopping action; equip or use an axe tool in a game or utility context

fa-axe-battle.appearanceId: broad double-bladed battle axe with a thick wide head and short handle; large symmetrical war axe with dual cutting edges
fa-axe-battle.functionalityId: equips or selects a battle axe weapon in a game; triggers a combat or attack action
fa-axe-battle.intentId: engage in combat using a battle axe; select a heavy weapon for a fighting or role-play action

fa-b.appearanceId: bold uppercase letter B; a single large capital B character
fa-b.functionalityId: applies bold formatting to selected text; inserts or labels the letter B
fa-b.intentId: make text bold or emphasize content; represent the letter B in a label or input

fa-baby.appearanceId: small infant figure with round head and simplified seated or swaddled body; a tiny human silhouette representing a newborn
fa-baby.functionalityId: filters content for baby or infant categories; navigates to parenting or childcare sections
fa-baby.intentId: find baby or infant products and resources; access parenting or childcare-related content
